output.executive_summary: ⚠️ CRISIS: Meta CPL hit $431 this week — 116% above the $200 target. Google remains healthy at $117 CPL. The Meta campaign is in acute failure: CTR dropped 21% WoW and CPL more than doubled. Immediate action required: pause the underperforming Meta ad sets today and reallocate budget to Google. Total leads (60) hit target only because Google is over-delivering — if Meta continues at current performance, it will drag blended CPL above target.

overall_metrics.vs_target: 60 leads vs 60 target (100% attainment); blended CPL $217 vs $200 target (8% over)
overall_metrics.vs_prior_period: +9% leads WoW (55 → 60); blended CPL up sharply from $159 → $217, driven entirely by Meta collapse

top_performers.name: Google — Dev Onboarding Keywords
top_performers.why_top: CTR of 4.0% on high-intent searches. CPL holding steady WoW ($115 → $117). This is the campaign's only healthy asset right now.

anomalies.likely_cause: CTR dropped 21% WoW (0.0038 → 0.0030), suggesting creative fatigue OR audience exhaustion — frequency likely at 4-5+ for this audience size. At $8.2k spend for only 19 leads, this campaign is actively destroying budget. Pause immediately.
Engineering/DevOps audiences are a small, premium segment on Meta. An audience that's been served this ad multiple times at $8k weekly spend has saturated. The algorithm has found all the easy wins.

recommendations.action: PAUSE Meta DevOps Cold campaign immediately — do not wait for end of week
recommendations.rationale: At $431 CPL with declining CTR, every additional day of spend is 2x worse than the target. Pausing today saves $1,200+ in wasted spend (at current daily pace) and stops the bleeding while creative and audience are refreshed.
recommendations.estimated_impact: Immediate: saves ~$8-10k in wasted spend over next 2 weeks. Frees budget for Google reallocation.

recommendations.rationale: Google is delivering at $117 CPL — 41% below target. With Meta paused, reallocate that budget here. Based on current Google conversion rate (10.7%), $8k/week generates ~68 leads/week vs. 41 currently.
recommendations.estimated_impact: Estimated +27 leads/week at ~$117 CPL. Blended CPL drops to ~$117 (vs. $200 target). Strong ROI.

recommendations.action: Rebuild Meta with LinkedIn-style targeting (job title + company size) and new creative before relaunching at $2k/week test budget
recommendations.rationale: The DevOps/engineering leader audience on Meta is small and premium. Rebuilding with tighter targeting (CTO + VP Eng at 50-300 employee companies) and 3 new creative variants will reset the algorithm and reduce wasted reach.
recommendations.estimated_impact: Expect 2-3 weeks of testing to find a Meta configuration that hits target CPL. Do not scale above $2k/week until CPL is consistently below $200.

budget_reallocation.rationale: Full pause of Meta cold. Google gets the bulk of reallocated budget where it's proven. Small Meta test budget rebuilds the channel for future scale without wasting at scale.

output.attribution_notes: Last-click 7-day window will miss any Meta-to-Google assisted conversions. Given Meta's poor performance this week, this is unlikely to materially change the picture. If Meta is rebuilt, recommend enabling view-through attribution (1-day) to properly credit awareness-to-search conversion paths.
